title: Clickable Button inside a Monday Doc
excerpt:
The ability to add a clickable button from a column value {button} inside a Monday Doc. 
Use case: A document approval button is clicked updating the document status to approved.

posts.author: jpd (Justin)
posts.cookedHtml:
The ability to add a clickable button from a column value {button} inside a Monday Doc.

Use case: A document approval button is clicked updating the document status to approved.

posts.author: dk_NFroehlich (Nils Fröhlich)
posts.cookedHtml:
This could be achieved if it was possible to integrate item columns into a monday doc.
A feature that would generally be really helpful.
